playbook.intent: Friday-clear backlog → Monday-morning task primed with prompt and acceptance.
playbook.scope: Solo founder runs a 60-minute Sunday ritual: top 3 outcomes for the week chosen, single-tasked file/board updated, no-go items deferred, Monday-morning first task primed with prompt + acceptance. Exit artifact is a week-plan note + Monday task ready to start.

success-criteria.criterion: Top 3 outcomes written with acceptance criteria
Monday task primed with prompt + spec

stage.name: Review
stage.intent: What happened last week, what shifted in priorities.

tasks.task: Read last week's outcomes vs actuals
Pull new signals from inbox + analytics

stage.decision-gate: Advance when last week is closed. Don't start planning if last week isn't reflected on.

stage.name: Prioritise
stage.intent: Pick top 3 outcomes for the week using RICE or MoSCoW.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when list is exactly 3. Refuse 4+ — single-operator constraint.

stage.name: Spec
stage.intent: Write acceptance criteria for the Monday task.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when Monday task is start-ready. No 'I'll figure it out Monday'.

extra.value: [Multi-week roadmap rewrite — that's quarterly, Backlog grooming of >10 items — keep it tight]
[Existing backlog file or board with current items, Friday-closeout completed (week reflection done)]
[Picking 5+ outcomes 'just in case' — guarantees at least 2 will slip, Skipping review — repeats last week's mistakes]
['Could I finish all 3 outcomes if half the week disappeared?', 'Is Monday''s first task start-ready, or am I still thinking about it?']
{human: faion get-content sunday-roadmap-ritual --format md, agent: faion get-content sunday-roadmap-ritual --format context, json: faion get-content sunday-roadmap-ritual --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P1 solo SaaS builder persona}]
